summary: Focana 2.1.0 makes it easier to choose what to do next, restart saved work, and avoid accidental completions.
improvements: What's next? now shows unfinished Parking Lot items, resumable Session History, and a Start new task row in one calmer dashboard.
Choosing a Parking Lot item or resumable History session now fills the task row first, so you can review it before starting.
Session Builder is now available as an optional step after choosing a task, with subtasks and next-up tasks carried into the session.
Running checklist items now give you a short Undo window after checking them off.
fixes: Clicking complete while a timer is running now asks Are you sure? with Pause, Go back, and Mark complete options.
Saving next-step notes from a paused task now returns Focana to the minimized float instead of immediately showing Ready to resume.
The minimized float now stays quiet after that pause handoff until the normal re-entry reminder cadence.
